org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableMap.NILMap<S,T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
      • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableMap.NILMap<S,T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, ImmutableMap<S,T>
    Enclosing class:
    DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>

    private static class DefaultImmutableMap.NILMap<S,T>
extends DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
    the empty map

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      boolean isEmpty()
      returns true if the map is empty

      Iterator<S> keyIterator() 
      ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      inserts mapping into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
      DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      removes mapping (key,...) from map
      ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      removes all mappings (...,value) from map

    • Method Detail

      • put

        public ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key,
                    T value)
        Description copied from class: DefaultImmutableMap
        inserts mapping into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
        Specified by:
        put in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:
        put in class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
        Parameters:
        key - a S to be used as key
        value - a T to be stored as value
        Returns:
        a ImmMap including the pair and all other pairs of the current map with keys different from the given key

      • get

        public T get(S key)
        Specified by:
        get in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:
        get in class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        value of type T that is mapped by key of type S

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        Description copied from class: DefaultImmutableMap
        returns true if the map is empty
        Specified by:
        isEmpty in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:
        isEmpty in class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        true iff the map is empty

        public boolean containsKey(S key)
        Specified by:
        containsKey in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:

        public DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
        Description copied from class: DefaultImmutableMap
        removes mapping (key,...) from map
        Specified by:
        remove in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:
        remove in class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if key is not in the map)

      • removeAll

        public ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
        Description copied from class: DefaultImmutableMap
        removes all mappings (...,value) from map
        Specified by:
        removeAll in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Overrides:
        removeAll in class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if value is not mapped)
